ul.li: TOP is the last pushed value (right operand)
Binary ops: pop right first, then left

div.p: b = vm_pop(vm) → b = 3 (TOP) a = vm_pop(vm) → a = 10 push(a - b) → push(10 - 3) → push(7)
⚠️ CRITICAL ORDER Pop RIGHT operand FIRST (b = 3) Then pop LEFT operand (a = 10) Compute: a - b = 10 - 3 = 7 ❌ WRONG: b - a = 3 - 10 = -7
Stack Memory: ┌─────────────┬─────────────┐ │ Index 0: 10 │ Index 1: 3 │ │ (left op) │ (right op) │ │ pushed 1st │ pushed 2nd │ └─────────────┴─────────────┘ ↑ stack_top
